title: stanleya tomentosa var. runcinata
intro: Stanleya tomentosa var. runcinata, also known as prickly phacelia, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae), characterized by its spiny stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Stanleya tomentosa var. runcinata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
